page_metadata.biotools__summary: cisTEM (computational imaging system for transmission electron microscopy) is a complete software solution for processing cryo-electron microscopy images of macromolecular complexes and obtain high-resolution 3D reconstructions from them.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: cisTEM (computational imaging system for transmission electron microscopy) is a complete software solution for processing cryo-electron microscopy images of macromolecular complexes and obtain high-resolution 3D reconstructions from them.
